headline: Strategic angle — First-mover advantage in green bond issuance and ESG narrative differentiation.
what_matters: Triggers BRSR, GRI, CDP, TCFD, DJSI, ESRS frameworks; no immediate regulatory deadline or penalty.
Positive ESG score gap versus peers; potential for index inclusion and peer pressure on laggards.
Enhances employer brand and appeal to sustainability-minded talent; minor positive consumer perception.
